nasb.text: He called Gehazi and said, “Call this Shunammite.” So he called her. And when she came in to him, he said, “Take up your son.”

esv.text: Then he summoned Gehazi and said, “Call this Shunammite.” So he called her. And when she came to him, he said, “Pick up your son.”

cnv.text: 神人呼喚基哈西，說：“你去叫那書念的婦人來。”他就去叫她，她來到他那裡，他就說：“把你的兒子抱起來。”

ccb.text: 以利沙叫基哈西请那妇人来。妇人来了，以利沙对她说：“把你儿子抱走吧。”
